internal.title: Nordwind Energy AG — existing account record
internal.snippet: Tier-1 prospect in DACH energy vertical. Prior NDA signed 2025-11. One previous proof-of-value on wind forecasting (closed-lost on price). Relationship owner: DACH energy team. Propensity score 0.71.

internal.title: Reference architecture: real-time energy-market optimisation on Azure
internal.snippet: Internal pattern combining Event Hubs + Stream Analytics + Azure ML for day-ahead bidding; deployed for two European utilities. Includes EU data-residency landing zone and PI historian connector.

internal.title: Meridian Retail Group — existing account record
internal.snippet: Existing Synapse + Power BI customer (managed by our data practice). No active CDP opportunity. Two stakeholders known. Renewal of analytics support due Q4. Cross-sell flag: customer data platform.

internal.title: UK GDPR consent & preference patterns for retail personalisation
internal.snippet: Internal guidance on centralised consent capture, lawful basis for profiling, and data-minimisation for cross-channel identity resolution. Includes a reusable consent-ledger design.

internal.title: AuroraPay — prospect record
internal.snippet: New inbound (fintech/payments, ANZ). NDA in place. No prior engagements. Flagged strategic: payments resilience is a current practice focus. No competing vendor identified yet.

internal.title: Reference architecture: PCI-DSS multi-region payments on Azure
internal.snippet: Active-active payments pattern with cross-region SQL failover groups, circuit breakers, SLO-based alerting, and a tested DR runbook. Two ANZ payments clients in production. Maps directly to common SEV-1 root causes.

external.title: Nordwind Energy announces 900 MWh battery expansion across DACH & Nordics
external.snippet: Press release: the IPP confirmed a EUR 1.3bn revenue base and a 24-month plan to deploy grid-scale storage, citing arbitrage and balancing revenues as core to the investment thesis.

external.title: European battery arbitrage spreads widened 22% YoY
external.snippet: Analyst note: intraday price volatility on EPEX and Nord Pool is increasing the value of automated bidding; operators relying on manual day-ahead bids are estimated to capture 10-18% less revenue.

external.title: Meridian Retail Group reports flat like-for-like sales, doubles down on digital
external.snippet: Trading update: GBP 3.1bn revenue, management commentary highlights investment in 'customer data and personalisation' as a FY27 priority to lift repeat purchase rates.

external.title: Market guide: composable CDPs and identity resolution in retail
external.snippet: Guidance: warehouse-native / composable CDP approaches are displacing monolithic suites; identity resolution and consent management are the top two adoption blockers cited by retailers.

external.title: ANZ payments provider AuroraPay hit by multi-hour authorisation outage
external.snippet: Report: merchants experienced elevated declines during a regional failover incident; AuroraPay said it is reviewing resilience and accelerating multi-region plans ahead of a Singapore launch.

external.title: PCI-DSS v4 emphasises continuity and tested DR for Level 1 processors
external.snippet: Briefing: Level 1 processors must evidence resilience, tested disaster recovery, and continuous monitoring; auditors increasingly expect SLO-based alerting and documented cross-region failover.
